#!/usr/bin/env node /* eslint-disable no-var, unicorn/prefer-node-protocol */ var parser = require(".."); var fs = require("fs"); var filename = process.argv[2]; if (!filename) { console.error("no filename specified"); } else { var file = fs.readFileSync(filename, "utf8"); var ast = parser.parse(file); console.log(JSON.stringify(ast, null, " ")); }
